name: 30 Pack Squishy Toys, Kawaii Squishies Party Favors for Kids 4-8 8-12 Treasure Box Toys for Classroom Birthday Xmas Gifts Goodie Bag Mini Animals Mochi Squishy Stress Relief Sensory Toys Random
bullets: Squishy Toys For Kids- A total of 30 pcs kawaii squishies, approximately 1 to 2 inches in size. The styles are random, and each one is a cute stuff that kids and adults alike love. There are a range of interesting shapes and colors, from animals to fruits, making them the perfect addition to any toy collection.

Party favors for kids 4-8- perfect Squeeze Toys as birthday party favors, Christmas party gifts, stocking stuffers, advent calendar fillers and goodie bag stuffers, Valentines Day Easter gifts etc. Instead of candy and children's snacks, put into pinata and gift bags, will be a perfect kids toy and gift idea for that boy girl 4 5 6 7 8 9 10 11 12 years old.

Treasure Box Toys for Classroom- Each of these mochi squishy toy is individually wrapped and comes with a beautiful gift box, which is convenient for teacher to use as prize box toys, classroom prizes, treasure chest, back-to-school gifts, graduation gifts and more.

Sensory Toys For Kids With Autism- These soft fidget toys help promote calm, reduce stress, anxiety, and can improve focus and concentration, especially for children or adults with ADD, ADHD, autism, or high stress and anxiety levels.

Child safe: These mini squishies are safe, non-toxic, and child friendly. Feel soft, do not hurt hands, dirty can also be washed clean, dry can continue to use, can be appropriate to add baby powder, will not stick to the hands.

reviews.name: Zach D
reviews.title: Huge Hit for Party Favors and Treasure Box Prizes
reviews.body: These squishy toys were a massive hit with the kids. There’s a great variety of cute designs and colors, and each one is soft, slow-rising, and fun to squeeze. The assortment kept the kids excited because everyone wanted to see which ones they got.They worked perfectly as party favors and treasure box prizes, and the quantity for the price is excellent. The toys are individually wrapped, which…

reviews.name: Marilin Fernández
reviews.title: Fun, Cute, and Perfect for Party Favors
reviews.body: These squishy toys were a huge hit with the kids! The assortment includes lots of cute designs and bright colors, and each squishy is soft and fun to squeeze. They were perfect for party favors, classroom prizes, and goodie bags. The kids loved collecting and trading them. Great value for the price and exactly as described. Highly recommend! 🎉😊🧸✨

reviews.name: Elsie Elle
reviews.title: Each squishy was unique and all were so cute and fun!
reviews.body: These were the absolute best! Each one was different, so we used these as little gifts for our toddler with potty training after other methods didn't end up working out. These were super fun and she loved having lots of little characters to play with. We still play with them all, the eyes rubbed off of two (cloud and strawberry), but I just did a sharpie dot on them. The rest had no issues and…

reviews.name: Angela Lee
reviews.title: Fun Little Goofy Party Favors
reviews.body: We got these for party favors for our grandsons 7th birthday. It was fun seeing all the different types of animals included, and the kids loved them! There were a few extra leftover, and I kept an adorable little yellow chick. They're fun! No noticeable odor either.
